business_ideas.idea: Holding company model buying profitable private companies and installing professional CEOs
Angel investing in early-stage startups as relationship-building and learning activity
Building niche businesses through three levels: launchpad (250k passive), enough (10-60M net worth), life's work

predictions.text: Index funds and real estate investments would have outperformed angel investing significantly
Most entrepreneurs overshoot on wealth targets causing stress and missing their actual happiness number
Boring businesses (trash, plumbing, window cleaning) reaching 2M revenue are more reliable than VC-backed startups
